purpose: Block strategy-projected artifact clusters when outputs escape the declared manifest, target roots, or receipt chain.
passConditions: every projected artifact path is listed in the manifest
every listed artifact stays under a declared target root
contract, SEJ, SOG, receipt, and proof outputs are separated by artifact kind
projection receipt binds manifest hash and strategy plan hash
strategy plan does not claim SOG execution or durable behavior promotion
completionPosture: Semantic strategy may project artifact clusters only through a bounded manifest and receipts.
